caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring red and gold floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible with the text "NPTEL" written beneath it. Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks and uses hand gestures to emphasize her points. She begins with both hands raised and open, then transitions to bringing her right hand across her chest. As she continues talking, she settles into a posture where her hands move rhythmically in front of her, gesturing as she explains a topic. Her facial expressions change from an open-mouthed speaking position to a slight smile.
